message:
feat(database): add SQLite connection defaults and runtime configuration

Harden SQLite connections with automatic setup and runtime controls:

- configure_connection_defaults(): sets busy timeout (250ms), enables
  foreign keys, and optionally enables WAL mode on every new connection
- set_busy_timeout(): public async method for runtime adjustment of
  the busy timeout value
- Four new tests: WAL mode verification on file-backed connections,
  transaction-drop rollback semantics, busy timeout under write
  contention, and cancellation-safe execute

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
